description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MinGW build that triggers on push to master branch, tags matching v*.*.*, and specific paths, as well as on pull requests to master branch with specific paths. Run a job on a windows-2019 environment with bash shell, checking out the code, setting up MinGW dependencies with chocolatey, caching libraries, installing libraries, configuring CMake with MinGW Makefiles, and building the project in debug configuration.
